name: Thai Stanley Electric Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Stanley Electric Public Company Limited manufactures and sells automotive bulbs, lighting equipment, molds and dies, and product designs primarily in Thailand. It offers various automotive lighting products, including head lamps and rear combination lamps; and motorcycle lighting products, such as head combination lamps, wind screens, front winkers, rear combination lamps, and rear winkers. It also manufactures LED and electronic components; and auto parts. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Muang, Thailand.
